# SLH-DSA-SHA2-128s (FIPS 205) sigVer known-answer vectors.
# Source: NIST ACVP-Server, gen-val/json-files/SLH-DSA-sigVer-FIPS205/internalProjection.json
#   and gen-val/json-files/SLH-DSA-sigGen-FIPS205/internalProjection.json (empty-context accept).
# Repo: https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server (master), files downloaded 2026-07-06.
# Upstream file SHA-256 (for provenance / audit):
#   SLH-DSA-sigVer-FIPS205/internalProjection.json a013fc2104f4ed4799d96d51141f65b965969b2cf10646626a021b6d456ce792
#   SLH-DSA-sigGen-FIPS205/internalProjection.json 62b42e7c27fda5de8a94aba2943ae413b59b6ea08141f3bc035b1eceae235dba
# These are INDEPENDENT published vectors (NOT self-generated). There is no
# SLH-DSA signer or key generator anywhere in orochi, so the accept-vector
# signatures cannot have been produced by this codebase.
# tgId 19 (sigVer) = SLH-DSA-SHA2-128s, external interface, pure  -> verify(pk,msg,ctx,sig)
# tgId 31 (sigVer) = SLH-DSA-SHA2-128s, internal interface        -> verifyInternal(pk,mprime,sig)
# sigGen tgId 19 tc 162 = external/pure with EMPTY context (the X.509 cert path); pk == sk[32:64].
# Record fields (one per line); records separated by a line '=='.
#   mode:   external | internal
#   expect: 1 (must accept) | 0 (must reject)
#   tc:     ACVP tcId (traceability)
#   reason: ACVP reason text
#   pk,ctx,msg,sig: lowercase hex (ctx present only for external mode)
